string.text: To counter the growing threat from Monolith fanatics armed with deadly "Gauss" rifles, Zone technicians came up with the "BOLTOV"! Proudly brought to some field tests by B.A. Barrakov himself!\nInspired by one of the most terrifying weapons of the Zone, the "BOLTOV" uses the power of an artifact to propel rusty old bolts. The bolt head accelerates to supersonic speed, detaching and flying straight to the target.
A good idea to attach a long rigid pipe and a beer bottle as a sight to this barrel.
Used as ammunition. Can be crafted at the workbench.
